name: Axis Bank Atlas Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: No fee waiver; milestone benefits offset the fee

categoryRates.description: 5 EDGE Miles per ₹200 spent on all purchases (2.5%)
3X EDGE Miles (15 per ₹200) on flights and hotels via Axis Travel EDGE
2X EDGE Miles (10 per ₹200) on all international spends

cappedCategories.description: Bonus EDGE Miles (above base) capped at 5,000 per statement cycle

redemptionOptions: Flights and hotels via Axis Travel EDGE portal (1 EDGE Mile = ₹1)
Transfer to airline partners (InterMiles, Singapore KrisFlyer, Etihad Guest, etc.)
Statement credit (at lower value - 1 EDGE Mile = ₹0.50)

welcomeBenefits.description: 5,000 bonus EDGE Miles on first spend within 45 days
welcomeBenefits.condition: Make any transaction within 45 days of card issuance

additionalBenefits: 8 international lounge visits - among the best for premium tier
Travel EDGE portal for booking flights and hotels with EDGE Miles
Transfer partners include 16+ airline loyalty programs
pros: Excellent 2.5% base reward rate as EDGE Miles
3X Miles on travel via Axis Travel EDGE portal
Strong milestone benefits can yield 42,500 bonus miles annually
8 international lounge visits - great for international travellers
cons: Bonus miles on accelerated categories are capped at 5,000/month
EDGE Miles lose value if redeemed as statement credit
Acceptance limited to Visa Signature (not Infinite) merchants
idealFor: Frequent international flyers who want flexible mile transfers
Users who value a high base earn rate on all spends
Travellers looking for strong international lounge access

faqs.question: What are EDGE Miles and how do they work?
faqs.answer: EDGE Miles are Axis Bank's travel rewards currency. 1 EDGE Mile = ₹1 when redeemed on the Axis Travel EDGE portal for flights and hotels. You can also transfer them to 16+ airline loyalty programs at varying ratios.

faqs.question: Which airlines can I transfer EDGE Miles to?
faqs.answer: Transfer partners include InterMiles, Singapore Airlines KrisFlyer, Etihad Guest, Turkish Airlines Miles&Smiles, British Airways Avios, Air France-KLM Flying Blue, and several others.

faqs.question: How does the Axis Travel EDGE portal work?
faqs.answer: It's Axis Bank's travel booking platform where you can book flights and hotels. Bookings earn 3X EDGE Miles, and you can also use accumulated EDGE Miles to pay for bookings at ₹1 per mile.

faqs.question: Is the ₹5,000 annual fee justified?
faqs.answer: With the welcome benefit of 5,000 miles (worth ₹5,000) and milestone benefits up to 42,500 miles annually, the fee is easily offset if you spend ₹2.5L+ per year.
